shame_layers: зависимость от молодых тел — 'я использую их, как они используют меня'
пустота после броска — 'снова никого, снова охота'

trauma_anchor.name: fear_of_becoming_invisible_with_age
trauma_anchor.origin: athletic youth ending, first wrinkles noticed, men her age looking past her at younger women
trigger_sensory: young couple holding hands in public
trigger_emotional: feeling invisible in a room full of young people
realization that she is older than someone's mother
